query:
UPDATE users SET
                github_login = $1,
                email = $2,
                access_token_enc = $3,
                refresh_token_enc = $4,
                token_expires_at = $5,
                timezone = CASE
                    WHEN timezone = 'UTC' THEN COALESCE($6::text, timezone)
                    ELSE timezone
                END,
                status = CASE
                    WHEN status = 'needs_reauth' THEN 'active'
                    ELSE status
                END
            WHERE user_id = $7
